log: === ROUND 1 ===

ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 5 falling damage. HP: 173/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===

Young Red Dragon attacks Half-Orc — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Half-Orc — Iron Concentration HP: 42/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Half-Orc — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Half-Orc — Iron Concentration HP: 26/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Half-Orc — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Half-Orc — Iron Concentration HP: 9/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Half-Orc — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person

→ Half-Orc — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.

→ Half-Orc — Iron Concentration healed for 6 HP. HP: 15/67

Young Red Dragon attacks Half-Orc — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Half-Orc — Iron Concentration HP: 1/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Half-Orc — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Half-Orc — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
